symptoms.leaves: Uniform pale yellow-green color starting from older lower leaves, progressing upward
symptoms.growth: Stunted overall growth, pale green canopy

symptoms.leaves: Dark green to purplish-red discoloration on older leaves, leaves may curl
symptoms.roots: Poor root development, reduced root branching
symptoms.growth: Stunted growth, delayed flowering and fruiting

symptoms.leaves: Brown scorching and curling of leaf tips and margins starting from older leaves
symptoms.growth: Poor fruit development, weak disease resistance, small fruits

symptoms.leaves: Dusty brown spots on upper leaves in rice (khaira disease), interveinal chlorosis, small narrow leaves
symptoms.growth: Delayed maturity, reduced tillering in rice

treatment.rate: 25 kg ZnSO4/ha soil application or 0.5% foliar spray

symptoms.leaves: Interveinal chlorosis on young leaves — veins remain green while tissue between turns yellow-white
symptoms.growth: New growth pale yellow to white, older leaves remain green

treatment.rate: 0.5% FeSO4 foliar spray, or 50 kg/ha soil application with organic matter

symptoms.leaves: Interveinal chlorosis on younger leaves with tan-gray spots, leaves appear speckled

treatment.rate: 0.5% MnSO4 foliar spray or 25 kg/ha soil application

symptoms.leaves: Uniform yellowing of young leaves (unlike nitrogen which starts from old leaves)
symptoms.growth: Stunted growth, delayed flowering, reduced oil content in oilseeds

symptoms.leaves: Thickened brittle leaves, distorted and curled new growth
symptoms.stem: Hollow stem, cracked stem in brassicas
symptoms.growth: Poor flowering, flower drop, poor fruit/seed set

treatment.rate: 10 kg borax/ha soil application or 0.2% foliar spray

symptoms.leaves: Distorted and hooked new leaves, tip burn on young leaves
symptoms.roots: Stunted root tips, poor root development
symptoms.growth: Blossom end rot in tomato, bitter pit in apple

soil_indicator.threshold: soil pH below 5.5, low exchangeable Ca

treatment.rate: calcium nitrate foliar spray 0.5%, or lime application to raise pH

symptoms.leaves: Interveinal chlorosis on older leaves — veins stay green, tissue between turns yellow, may turn reddish-purple
symptoms.growth: Premature leaf drop, reduced fruit quality

treatment.rate: 0.5% MgSO4 foliar spray or 25 kg/ha soil application
